name.en: Uria, Lord of Searing Flames - Sacred Beast of Cataclysmic Fire
name.ja: <ruby>劫<rt>ごう</rt></ruby><ruby>火<rt>か</rt></ruby>の<ruby>三<rt>さん</rt></ruby><ruby>幻<rt>げん</rt></ruby><ruby>魔<rt>ま</rt></ruby>－<ruby>神<rt>しん</rt></ruby><ruby>炎<rt>えん</rt></ruby><ruby>皇<rt>おう</rt></ruby>ウリア
name.zh-CN: 劫火之三幻魔－神炎皇乌利亚

text.en: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with a "Sacred Beast" card. You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 "Sacred Beast" Trap from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Uria, Lord of Searing Flames - Sacred Beast of Cataclysmic Fire" once per turn. Gains 1000 ATK/DEF for each Trap in the GYs. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Spell/Trap on the field; destroy it. Neither player can activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation.
text.zh-CN: 此卡不可通常召唤。仅可通过“三幻魔”卡的效果特殊召唤。此卡名的①效果1回合仅可使用1次。①：向对手出示手牌的此卡可以发动。从牌组将1张“三幻魔”陷阱卡加入手牌。然后，挑选自己的1张手牌舍弃。②：此卡的攻击力・守备力上升双方墓地陷阱卡的数量×1000的数值。③：在每个自己・对手回合中1次，以场上的1张魔法・陷阱卡为对象可以发动（应对此发动，双方不可发动效果）。将该卡破坏。
